ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline - 10th May
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just a friendly reminder that the final semester project is due on 10th May, 2026 at 5:00 PM. Please ensure you upload the report and the presentation slides to the shared drive (link: <URL>) before the deadline.

If you encounter any issues, let me know.

Thanks,
[Your Name]

spam.subject: URGENT: FedEx Delivery Issue - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent FedEx shipment (tracking # 123456789) was delayed and a missed delivery fee of Rs 500 has been applied. To avoid further charges, please confirm your delivery instructions by clicking the secure link below within 24 hours.

<URL>

If you do not address this within the stipulated time, the fee will be added automatically and the package may be returned.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Service
